meaning: n.安逸,安心,不费力,悠闲vt.使悠闲,使安心,减轻,放松vi.减弱,减轻,放松,灵活地移动
examples: This should help ease the pain.
I gave him some brandy to ease the pain.
The task was accomplished with comparative ease.
Other advances grow out of massive improvements in cost, quality and ease of use.
In the ring he wrestled with the same ease that he displayed outside of it.
